parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { mode: 'cadence', campaign_id: null, content_item_id: null, rejection_reason: null } }];

parameters.query:
SELECT
  ci.*,
  c.name AS campaign_name,
  c.brief,
  c.product_type,
  c.target_audience,
  cs.id AS strategy_id,
  cs.positioning,
  cs.key_messages,
  cs.channels,
  cs.posting_cadence,
  cs.content_pillars
FROM content_items ci
JOIN campaigns c ON c.id = ci.campaign_id
LEFT JOIN campaign_strategies cs ON cs.campaign_id = c.id
WHERE ci.id = $1::uuid;

SELECT
  c.id AS campaign_id,
  c.name AS campaign_name,
  c.brief,
  c.product_type,
  c.target_audience,
  c.status AS campaign_status,
  cs.id AS strategy_id,
  cs.positioning,
  cs.key_messages,
  cs.channels,
  cs.posting_cadence,
  cs.content_pillars
FROM campaigns c
JOIN campaign_strategies cs ON cs.campaign_id = c.id
WHERE ($1::uuid IS NULL AND c.status IN ('strategy_ready', 'content_in_progress', 'active'))
   OR c.id = $1::uuid
ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 5;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.LLM_MODEL_CONTENT || $env.LLM_MODEL || 'gpt-4o', temperature: 0.7, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are the Content Producer. Produce drafts + media briefs only. Never publish. Output strict JSON: {"items":[{"channel":"instagram","content_type":"post|reel_script|ad_copy|email","content_pillar":"...","draft_copy":"...","media_brief":"...","scheduled_time_suggestion":null}]}. Match channel norms. Include clear CTA. Media briefs describe visuals only. If rejection_reason is provided, produce ONE improved replacement item for the same channel/pillar.' }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify($json.campaign) } ] }) }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE campaigns
SET status = CASE WHEN status IN ('strategy_ready','draft') THEN 'content_in_progress' ELSE status END
WHERE id = $1::uuid;
INSERT INTO agent_actions_log (agent_name, action_type, entity_type, entity_id, payload, result)
VALUES (
  'content_producer',
  'queue_for_approval',
  'content_item',
  $2::uuid,
  $3::jsonb,
  'blocked_pending_approval'
)
RETURNING id;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, message: 'Drafts queued for human approval. Agent 2 does not publish.', items_created: $('Insert Pending Items').all().map(i => ({ id: i.json.id, channel: i.json.channel, status: i.json.status })) } }}
